hooks.name: Post-Session Diagnostics
hooks.description: After agent execution completes, runs getDiagnostics on .rs files modified during the session to catch compile errors without consuming context with full cargo output

action.prompt:
Run `git diff --name-only HEAD` to find .rs files modified in this session. If any .rs files were modified, run getDiagnostics on them (max 10 files). Report only if errors are found — if all clean, say nothing. Do NOT run cargo build/clippy — getDiagnostics is sufficient and faster.

Additionally, run `git diff HEAD` and scan the diff for debug leftovers: `dbg!`, `todo!`, `println!`, `eprintln!`, `#[allow(dead_code)]` on new code. If any found, warn the developer with file and line. Do NOT auto-fix — just report.
